with open('/tmp/alb-data/ALB-007.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

    round_num = int(match.group(1))
    guess = match.group(2)
    start = match.start()
    rounds.append({'num': round_num, 'guess': guess, 'start': start})

# For each round, extract ALL correct properties AND wrong properties to build constraints
# Track unique constraints
correct_constraints = set()  # property values that ARE correct
wrong_constraints = {}  # property value -> list of rounds where it was wrong

for i, r in enumerate(rounds):

        sections_text = sections_match.group(1)
        # Find all properties with (correct) or (wrong)
        for line_match in re.finditer(r'-\s*(.+?)\((correct|wrong)(?:,\s*[^)]*)?\)', sections_text):
            prop_text = line_match.group(1).strip().rstrip(';').strip()
            status = line_match.group(2)
            
            if status == 'correct':
                correct_constraints.add(prop_text)
            else:
                if prop_text not in wrong_constraints:
                    wrong_constraints[prop_text] = []
                wrong_constraints[prop_text].append(r['guess'])

print("=== ALL CORRECT CONSTRAINTS ===")
for c in sorted(correct_constraints):
    print(f"  {c}")

print(f"\nTotal correct constraints: {len(correct_constraints)}")

# Check for conflicts
print("\n=== CONFLICT CHECK ===")
for c in correct_constraints:

import re
import json

with open('/tmp/alb-data/ALB-007.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find all rounds
round_pattern = re.compile(r'\[USER\]: Round (\d+): Guess (.+?) \(#\d+\)')

# Find all round sections
rounds = []
for match in round_pattern.finditer(content):
    round_num = int(match.group(1))
    guess = match.group(2)
    start = match.start()
    rounds.append({'num': round_num, 'guess': guess, 'start': start})

# Track constraints properly
# For each round, parse the sections properly
# Format: 
#   - Type: value1 (correct); value2 (wrong); value3 (correct, too high)
#   - Base Stats: 570 (correct)
#   etc.

correct_values = {
    'Type': set(),
    'Base Stats': set(),
    'Generation': set(),
    'Abilities': set(),
    'Evolution': set(),
    'Other': set()
}

for i, r in enumerate(rounds):
    start = r['start']
    end = rounds[i+1]['start'] if i+1 < len(rounds) else len(content)
    round_text = content[start:end]
    
    # Extract sections
    sections_match = re.search(r'Sections:(.*?)(?:Result:|Remaining rounds:)', round_text, re.DOTALL)
    if not sections_match:
        continue
    sections_text = sections_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each line starting with "  - SectionName:"
    lines = sections_text.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        line = line.strip()
        if not line.startswith('- '):
            continue
        # Remove leading "- "
        line = line[2:]
        # Split on first ":"
        if ':' not in line:
            continue
        section_name, value_part = line.split(':', 1)
        section_name = section_name.strip()
        value_part = value_part.strip()
        
        if section_name not in correct_values:
            continue
        
        # Split value_part by ";" to get individual properties
        parts = re.split(r';\s*', value_part)
        for part in parts:
            part = part.strip()
            if not part:
                continue
            # Check if (correct) is in this part
            if '(correct)' in part:
                # Extract the value (everything before the first "(")
                value = re.sub(r'\s*\(.*$', '', part).strip()
                if value:
                    correct_values[section_name].add(value)

print("=== CORRECT CONSTRAINTS ===")
for sec, vals in correct_values.items():
    if vals:
